'''tashuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gracioso|gracioso]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gracioso|gracioso]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tashuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæshikith|tæshikith]] || [[word:tæshikij|tæshikij]] || [[word:tæshikish|tæshikish]] || [[word:tæshiki|tæshiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashushukuth|tashushukuth]] || [[word:tashushukuj|tashushukuj]] || [[word:tashushukush|tashushukush]] || [[word:tashushuku|tashushuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashukuth|tashukuth]] || [[word:tashukuj|tashukuj]] || [[word:tashukush|tashukush]] || [[word:tashuku|tashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashufkuth|tashufkuth]] || [[word:tashufkuj|tashufkuj]] || [[word:tashufkush|tashufkush]] || [[word:tashufkuf|tashufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tashukuthu|tashukuthu]] || [[word:tashukuju|tashukuju]] || [[word:tashukushu|tashukushu]] || [[word:tashukuku|tashukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tashukuth|tashukuth]] || [[word:tashukuj|tashukuj]] || [[word:tashukush|tashukush]] || [[word:tashuku|tashuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tashukuthul|tashukuthul]] || [[word:tashukujul|tashukujul]] || [[word:tashukushul|tashukushul]] || [[word:tashukukul|tashukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tashukuthuthu|tashukuthuthu]] || [[word:tashukujuju|tashukujuju]] || [[word:tashukushushu|tashukushushu]] || [[word:tashukuku|tashukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tashukuthun|tashukuthun]] || [[word:tashukujun|tashukujun]] || [[word:tashukushun|tashukushun]] || [[word:tashukukun|tashukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tashukuthuoro|tashukuthuoro]] || [[word:tashukujuoro|tashukujuoro]] || [[word:tashukushuoro|tashukushuoro]] || [[word:tashukukuoro|tashukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
